name: Vercel
description: Deployment and hosting platform for frontend and serverless applications (static sites, serverless functions, edge functions).

auth_methods.note: Vercel uses Personal Access Tokens sent in the Authorization: Bearer header (documented as API access tokens). Tokens are managed in the account tokens dashboard. Interpreting 'api_key' and 'token' as equivalent here: bearer personal access tokens (API tokens).

credential_access.note: Account Tokens page shows users can create Personal Access Tokens from their account dashboard; no payment or sales approval is required to create tokens (tokens are created in the account UI).

api_surface.note: Vercel publishes a full REST API with endpoints for projects, deployments, domains, teams, etc., covering most product objects (see REST API docs root and endpoints).

buildability.note: Public REST API docs exist and developers can create Personal Access Tokens self-serve via account dashboard, enabling immediate integration.

queries: Vercel REST API docs authentication obtain token "Personal Token" "Vercel" site:vercel.com/docs OR site:vercel.com "API Token" "Personal Token" "REST API"
